message:
🐛 Fix feedback modal: placeholder overwrite, misleading errors, weak validation (#1250)

Three bugs fixed:
1. Placeholder text repeatedly overwrites user input — initialContext creates
   a new object ref each render, causing useEffect to re-fire. Fixed with
   useRef to track open/close transitions and only pre-fill once.
2. "Unable to submit — GitHub login may be required" shown for all errors
   including validation failures — now shows actual backend error message.
3. Frontend validation only checked 10 chars total but backend requires
   title >= 10 chars AND description >= 20 chars AND >= 3 words. Frontend
   validation now matches backend rules.

Also fixed api.ts POST/PUT/DELETE to include response body text in errors
(GET already did this but the write methods discarded it).

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
